latestModel: Automatic Amphibian GMT Dive Watch CT137
notes: Australian watch brand producing contemporary analog watches. Known for minimalist designs and accessible pricing.

Hong Kong-based microbrand focused on honest value, distinctive dials, and everyday durability. Known for clean, versatile timepieces positioned as premium quality without luxury markup. Recent models include the Blue Shard GADA watch and Horizon GMT.
Chinese watch brand offering affordable mechanical and automatic watches. Known for sport and dive watch models.

India's homegrown microbrand known for refined, minimalist designs and bespoke mechanical/automatic watches with limited production runs. Emphasizes craftsmanship and clean geometric architecture-influenced designs.

Albedo Watches is a microbrand designed in The Netherlands, officially launched with their first timepiece, the Albedo 1901. The brand offers vintage-inspired timepieces with modern precision, featuring mechanical chronographs, automatic watches, quartz watches, and mecha-quartz movements.

Singaporean microbrand known for artfully crafted, understated timepieces. Features models like the Dromo dive watch, Opus V2 dress watch, and Quantra with micro-rotor movements. Offers a 4-year Worry-Free Guarantee on mechanical movements.

latestModel: Christopher Ward Bronze Trident C65 Homage
notes: ApexRare is a Chinese watch brand known for creating homage watches, including Christopher Ward C65 Diver and Alpinist homage models. The brand focuses on affordable watches while maintaining quality standards.

A 100% Filipino-owned watchmaking company based in Manila, Philippines. Specializes in mechanical timepieces and automatic watches designed for daily use. Known for premium packaging and luxury design aesthetics.

Artego is a relatively new watch company specializing in dive watches with retro styling. Known for producing divers with bright faces, easy-to-read hands, and water resistance ratings up to 500m, using automatic movements.
Singapore-based independent celebrating Chinese cultural heritage through watch design. Swiss-assembled. Strong following in Asia and internationally. Visitability unconfirmed.

Athaya Vintage specializes in vintage watches and vintage watch parts, offering collections including classic diver watches and pilot watches. The brand operates through multiple channels including a main website, parts store, and online shop.

ATOWAK is a luxury mechanical watch brand inspired by Caesar cipher design with award-winning iF and MUSE design recognition. Each model features exclusive, original movements crafted for mechanical watch enthusiasts seeking distinctive, one-of-a-kind timepieces.
Awake Watches is an Australian microbrand producing minimalist dive watches and field watches with a focus on functionality.
Hong Kong independent brand known for distinctive design and creative complications in affordable automatic watches. Focuses on unique dial configurations.

Baltany is a Chinese watch brand specializing in affordable retro and vintage-style watches with mechanical and quartz movements, premium stainless steel construction, sapphire crystals, and homage designs. Compared favorably to San Martin in terms of quality.
Bangalore Watch Company is an Indian microbrand producing field watches and dress watches with a focus on craftsmanship.

latestModel: BERNY-Men Automatic Compressor-style Diver Watch V3-AM339M
notes: BERNY WATCH has been established since 1995, offering timeless luxury watches for both men and women. The brand features various movement types including automatic and quartz mechanisms, with designs ranging from diver watches to field watches and vintage-style pieces.

Bewell is an eco-friendly wooden watch brand selling all-natural and handmade wooden watches for men and women. Known for laser-engraved designs and Japanese quartz movement timepieces. Operates official US site and sells through major retailers including eBay, Etsy, Walmart, and Amazon.

Australian watch brand based in Sydney that assembles most watches locally. The brand is shifting focus from quartz to primarily automatic watches and features limited collections inspired by Australian moments and landscapes.
A fashion watch brand known for wooden and bamboo watch designs aimed at casual and fashion-conscious consumers.

Chinese-origin brand that provides premium quality watches at affordable prices. Offers automatic, mechanical, and quartz movements with styles including titanium, field, skeleton, and leather watches.

German watch brand designed for men, known for automatic mechanical watches combining performance and elegance. Features automatic movements with details like sapphire crystals, zircon settings, and luminous dials.
Chinese microbrand producing affordable mechanical watches with quartz and automatic movements, known for quality-to-price ratio.

latestModel: CakCity Pilot Digital Diving Outdoor Sport 20ATM
notes: CakCity produces digital sports watches with multifunction features including light, stopwatch, waterproof, shockproof, calendar, EL backlight, and alarm clock. The brand focuses on affordable sport watches suitable for everyday wear, outdoor work, and athletic activities.

latestModel: Carlson Raulen Watches for Men Waterproof Luxury Fashion Rectangle Quartz Sports Chronograph Watch
notes: Carlson Instruments is a California-based watch brand focused on building serious dive watches incorporating rare materials such as hand forged stainless Damascus steel and mokume gane.

latestModel: Cronos 2026 NEW 36mm Automatic PT5004/Miyota 90s5 See-through Back Watch L6050M L6051M
notes: Chronos is a Chinese microbrand offering quartz watches with leather straps and waterproof features at competitive prices. Products are available on Amazon and Reddit discussions indicate positive reception for value-to-quality ratio.
Chinese independent known for award-winning sculptural and mechanical watch design. Multiple Red Dot and iF Design Award winner. Based in Shenzhen. Visitability unconfirmed.

Independent Taiwanese watchmaker CKL Taiwan founded by Liao Zhe-Kuan in 2019. Known for distinctive floating balance wheel designs using modified ETA/Seagull movements with extensive hand-finishing and traditional watchmaking techniques. Creates limited edition handcrafted pieces.
Chinese watch brand known for affordable mechanical watches and watch parts. Produces dive watches and other casual timepieces.
Chinese watch brand producing affordable casual and dress watches. Primarily sold through online retailers.

Filipino watch microbrand dedicated to bringing value proposition timepieces inspired by classic icons. Created and dedicated to innovation and value-proposition. Physical locations at Unbox GH, Promenade Mall and The Rockwellist, Rockwell Power Plant.
A proudly Western Australian watch design studio creating affordable tool watches for the Urban Warrior. Known for dive watches and pilot models suitable for both boardroom and wilderness use.
Hong Kong brand founded in 2025 by watch enthusiasts including co-founder Johnathan Chan. Specialises in accessible ceramic-cased watches.

EXP watches are professional timing equipment engineered for harsh outdoor environments. The brand appears to have multiple entities including Olmsted ExP-01 experimental series and Expedition Timepiece.

latestModel: MERKUR World Time Alarm Clock Retro All Steel Leisure Limited Edition
notes: Fanzhi (凡致) is a Chinese watch brand under Merkur with a vision of creating "gorgeous watches for ordinary people." The brand focuses on affordable mechanical watches with good design and dependable movements, including models featuring flying tourbillons and vintage-inspired designs.

Fifty-Four is a watch manufacturer under the LEGEND brand that started operations in 1992 and is based in South China. The company specializes in watch production with over 300 employees and is one of the leaders in the region. Known for models like the 62MAS and MM300, featuring 316L stainless steel cases and NH35 movements.

latestModel: FOD Racing Mechanical Chronograph 70's Retro Rally Style
notes: FOD is a watch brand featuring mechanical chronographs with hand-wound Seagull ST1901 movements. Known for vintage 70s-style designs with military aesthetics, offered under $200 price point.

Japanese microbrand based in Minami-Soma, Fukushima Prefecture. Aims to create daily-wear watches inspired by different aspects of the city, similar to Grand Seiko on a micro brand scale. Employs mostly local workers.

Galvin Watch Company is a family-owned Australian microbrand founded in March 2020 by Finnish watchmaker Susan Galvin. Known for automatic luxury watches with classic designs and unique case shapes, including the Alku and Loimu collections inspired by the aurora borealis.
A Singaporean microbrand producing mechanical watches with bold designs and affordable pricing. Known for producing limited edition models with strong community engagement.

Singapore-based microbrand specializing in mechanical watches with playful design and cultural inspiration. Collections pay homage to the Lorongs of Geylang with hand-assembled timepieces in black steel or carbonised cases featuring vibrant straps and dials.

Swiss family-owned watch brand founded in 2016 by Octavio Garcia, former Artistic Director of Audemars Piguet. Known for avant-garde design, cutting-edge engineering, and bold material combinations with sporty automotive-inspired aesthetics.
Chinese microbrand producing affordable mechanical watches with automatic and quartz movements. Known for accessible pricing and modern designs.

One-man atelier based in Tainan, Taiwan that creates watches using NOS (new old stock) vintage cases and movements from the 1970s and earlier. Known for repurposing unused vintage components with creative dial designs.
Chinese microbrand known for affordable dive watches with in-house designed cases and dials. Produces vintage-inspired field and diver watches at accessible price points.

Independent watch brand inspired by Japanese culture and craftsmanship. Offers value-driven timepieces combining premium materials with sophisticated workmanship. Uses Japanese automatic movements such as Caliber NH36A.

HKED watches were created in 2017 by a forum user named Ed from Hong Kong in collaboration with Thomas at Red Star watch factory. The brand is known for homage watches, particularly chronograph designs inspired by the Seagull 1963, offered with acrylic or sapphire crystal variants.
Historic Indian watchmaker founded in 1953 as Hindustan Machine Tools. Known for affordable mechanical watches with in-house movements, particularly dive and field watches.

latestModel: Pilbara Rock Dive Watch - Second Release
notes: Australian watch brand designed and influenced by Western Australia. Produces high-quality men's wristwatches including dive watches, field watches, and automatic mechanical timepieces.
Australian, German, and Dutch microbrand hand-built in Sydney. Known for dress watches with high gloss enamel dials and polished case elements. Uses NH35 movements in their watches.
Kyoto-based micro brand producing automatic and quartz dive watches. Started with Rolex Submariner homages, now features original designs with watch sizes typically over 40mm. Made in Japan.

Hz Watches was founded with the philosophy that everyday watches should be simple, accurate, and dependable. The brand produces quartz and chronograph models in titanium cases, including the flagship HZ.01, the HZ.02 Chronograph, and the HZ.03 Blue Marble dress watch.
Filipino watch brand founded in 2014 that crafts classic timepieces with sophisticated style and elegance. Official timepiece for ASEAN50 and 30th SEA Games. Proudly made in the Philippines.
Chinese microbrand known for affordable military-style watches with quartz and automatic movements.
Indian watch brand based in Jaipur.

JW Watch is a watch company focused on providing valuable timepieces with excellent craftsmanship. The brand emphasizes both quality design and social values including gender equality and racial harmony.

JW-EX is a mechanical designer watch by Jason Chan featuring a unique in-house movement with zero premade parts and 80 hours of power reserve. The brand has 11 years of watch design experience and offers both Kickstarter and retail sales through Jason Watch Shop.
Japanese watchmaker established in 1999, known for field watches, dive watches, and sports models with affordable pricing.
Japanese microbrand focused on traditional watchmaking aesthetics with vintage-inspired dial designs and accessible movements.

Maker's Watch Knot is a Japan-made watch brand known for customizable 'mix and match' straps using traditional Japanese crafts and materials. The brand operates 12 directly-owned shops across Japan and specializes in lacquer dials paired with unique Japanese fabrics and leathers.
Japanese microbrand established in Kyoto in 2020. Specializes in vintage-inspired watches with contemporary design. All watches are hand-assembled in their Kyoto workshop.

Kurono Tokyo is the accessible brand of independent watchmaker Hajime Asaoka, based in Tokyo. Known for elegant, minimalist dial design with Japanese aesthetic sensibility. Movement assembly and casing carried out in Tokyo. Extremely limited production — releases sell out within seconds online. No atelier visits.

Indonesian watch brand founded in 2014 by a designer who previously worked in advertising and design. Known for affordable, creatively designed watches with customizable configurations and timeless aesthetics.

Lytt Labs is a watch brand focused on quality, design and technical innovation. Known for the Inception watch collection featuring unique dial designs with luminescent paint and sci-fi aesthetics. All watches come with a 2-year international warranty.
Singaporean independent watch brand known for vintage-inspired dive watches with modern reliability. Uses automatic movements and offers rugged, sports-oriented designs at accessible price points.
Thailand microbrand producing full titanium diver watches. ECO 1000 model features 48mm diameter, 9015 Miyota movement, rated to 1000m, limited to 100 pieces and sold out.

Chinese luxury microbrand founded by Benjamin Chee HH. Known for dial artistry including Heritage Guilloché, Suzhou Silk Embroidery, and Cloisonné Enamel dials. Operates under philosophy of 'Made in China with Pride' across three collections: Celadon Imperial, Celadon Claire de Lune, and Celadon Haute Horlogerie.

Indian watch brand focused on generational craftsmanship blended with modern horology. Known for purposeful design and exploration of HMT heritage. Produces 38mm automatic watches with bold, resilient aesthetics.
Maranez is a vintage-inspired diver watch brand with a tribute to early Italian dive watch design. Watches feature clean dials, scratch-proof sapphire crystals, and are built for outdoor activities.
Marshall Sutcliffe is a watch restorer and content creator who specializes in restoring vintage watches through his YouTube channel Wristwatch Revival and social media presence.
Matthew and Son (MAS) Watches was founded in 2019 by Matthew Francis, a watch enthusiast who shares his passion for watches with his young son, Tate. The brand is classified as a microbrand.
Unknown brand — manual review needed
Australian microbrand specializing in affordable, design-focused watches with modern aesthetics.
Australian microbrand specializing in affordable, design-focused watches with modern aesthetics.
Unknown brand — manual review needed

Minase is operated by Kyowa Co. Ltd. in Yuzawa City, Akita Prefecture. Renowned for extraordinary case machining precision — multi-faceted case surfaces with mirror and satin finishing that rivals Swiss independents. Small production volume. Visits can be arranged through the brand directly. Highly recommended for luxury tour groups interested in Japanese craft precision. Yuzawa is accessible from Tokyo via Komachi Shinkansen (approx. 2 hours).

Malaysian-Swiss independent brand by photographer Ming Thein and partner Hendrik Müller. Design, engineering and final quality control in Kuala Lumpur; movement production in La Chaux-de-Fonds, Switzerland. One of the most respected independents globally. KL studio visits by arrangement.

Mini Focus is a watch brand offering quartz and automatic mechanical watches with various styles including chronographs and luxury fashion designs. Products are available through their official website, eBay, Walmart, and Amazon, featuring waterproof cases and silicon or stainless steel bands.

Independent Singapore-based watch company. MMI stands for Modernization, Modification and Innovation, representing their design philosophy. Known for collaborations featuring traditional craftsmanship like Washi dials in contemporary designs.

Movement in Motion is a designer watch brand developed by Japan micro-brand TiCTAC. The brand produces both automatic and quartz watches, including models like the Dual Time Retrograde Travel series from 2020. Watches are made in Japan and feature specifications such as open heart automatic movements and stainless steel cases.

Naval Watch Co. has roots dating back to 1800s Switzerland and pioneered luminous painted dials in military timepieces. Now operates out of Japan, collaborating with design firm LOWERCASE to produce military-inspired watches.

Guangzhou NAVIFORCE Watch Co., Ltd. was established in 2012 and provides OEM/ODM watch manufacturing services. The brand specializes in men's digital sports watches, military-style chronographs, and quartz waterproof wristwatches with multifunctional features.
Japanese microbrand focused on vintage-inspired divers and military-style watches with retro aesthetics.

Swiss-made watch brand designed and developed in Melbourne, Australia. Known for watches designed to be worn in the ocean, taken into space, and used anywhere in between. The brand applies car design principles to watchmaking.

One Eleven produces solar-powered tool watches made from recycled materials. The brand focuses on lightweight, durable, and affordable timepieces designed for adventure and outdoor use. They are a 1% for the Planet Partner.
Outcast Watch is founded by Rob Valli and produces luxury automatic mechanical watches with customizable dial and parts combinations. The brand emphasizes quality and reliability.
A South Korean microbrand known for affordable automatic watches and homage designs with good build quality.
PerpetuaL Watch Company was established in 2004 and is based in Hong Kong. They produce only 20 watches per month, with all assembly and quality checks performed in-house at their own workshop.
Hong Kong-based microbrand specializing in affordable dive watches and sports models with quartz and automatic movements.
A South Korean watch brand with limited available information.

latestModel: Rolex GMT Master II Guinness Jubilee 40mm 126713GRNR
notes: PJK makes a range of luxury sports watches that are handmade by skilled craftspeople.

Multiple watch brands use the Raja name across different countries. Raja Watch Co. is a Filipino brand inspired by Eastern horology and dive watches from the Celebes and Andaman Seas. Pook Watches (Finland) produces the Pook Raja, a retro diving watch with 1970s design elements.

Ratio Watches was designed in Italy and conceived in Singapore, founded in 2017. They specialize in men's and women's dive watches integrated with Seiko or Citizen Miyota movements, chosen by divers and adventurers globally.

Rdunae was established in 2019 by Feng, who integrated 17 years of diverse industry experience into watch design and manufacturing. The brand specializes in field watches and dive watches, handling every aspect from CAD design to manufacturing and quality control in-house.

Red Balloon is a children's watch brand specializing in time-teaching analog watches. The brand markets educational timepieces designed to help kids learn how to tell time, with models featuring adjustable straps and stainless steel construction.

latestModel: Regia Diver Grey Sunburst Angry Eye Edition
notes: Regia Timepieces offers custom-painted watches inspired by the Sarmizegetusa Regia Calendar. Known for collaborations with artists like Sylvia Chow and Timothy John, featuring unique dial designs including floral and skull motifs.

latestModel: 43.5mm Relax Automatic Watch With NH35 Movement
notes: Relax is an American parody watch brand by Atelier Perpetuel that creates custom-made concept watches featuring high-quality Seiko movements. Known for satirical takes on famous watch designs like Rolex, with intentional design flaws such as broken crowns on dials.
Singapore-based independent watch microbrand established in 2014. Specializes in limited edition mechanical watches with ornate guilloché dials as their design signature.

Hong Kong-based independent watch manufacturer combining quartz movements with vintage-inspired designs featuring automotive styling. Known for offering quality watches at budget-friendly prices, targeting those unwilling to spend thousands on timepieces.
Unknown brand — manual review needed

Australian microbrand founded in 2019 by Peter Sargison and his wife, Akira. Family-owned designer and manufacturer featuring fully in-house designed watches with Swiss and Japanese movements and proprietary hi-tech surface hardening treatment.

Stewart Dawson London is a label of the D Group founded in 2005, reinterpreted in 2015. The brand creates Italian-inspired, high-quality Swiss-made watches with British heritage and style, including pilot-themed models.
Chinese microbrand known for affordable mechanical watches, often vintage-inspired designs with accessible pricing.
Sunwa is registered in the Microbrand Watches database. The brand operates a website at sunwaus.com and appears to be active in the watch market.

latestModel: Tactical Frog Titanium FX-Diving Watch V4
notes: Tactical Frog is a rising watch brand that produces classic watches faithful to original design aesthetics. The brand offers a range of movements including solar chronograph, automatic, quartz, and diver watches with features like sapphire crystals, water resistance up to 200m, and various case materials including titanium and stainless steel.

Takehiko Kuroki is one of Japan's most respected independent watchmakers and an invited AHCI member. He produces entirely hand-finished mechanical watches from a small private Tokyo studio. No public website or confirmed atelier visit programme has been documented; contact would need to be made through specialist press or the AHCI. Verify before including in a tour itinerary.

Tandorio is a direct-to-customer (DTC) Chinese watch company that designs and produces automatic, hand-winding, and quartz watches with Seiko and Miyota movements. The brand ships from Hong Kong and offers customization options.
South Korean independent brand known for affordable homage watches and original designs inspired by vintage military and dive watches. Uses Miyota and Seagull movements.
A Hong Kong-based watch brand, Solvil et Titus, known for dress watches and mechanical timepieces.
Micro brand startup based in Hong Kong. The owner is both a watchmaker and leather craftsman, creating watches with included straps and bracelets.

latestModel: Dark Matter-Rafael Márquez Collaboration Limited Edition
notes: TSAR BOMBA is a world-class luxury watchmaker trusted across 186+ countries and endorsed by footballer Rafael Márquez. The brand is known for automatic, quartz, and carbon fiber watches with innovative and futuristic design that fuses atomic engineering with horology.

Dutch watch brand founded in 2012 by Robbert Suurland, specializing in high-quality professional and technical watches including Diver and Pilot models. The brand designed a limited edition for Spanish sea rescue service but appears to have ceased active production.
Singapore-based online watch store offering a diverse range from classic dress watches to rugged field watches. Brand focuses on variation and balance between sophistication, quality, and fun.
Singapore's first Malay watch brand dedicated to honouring and showcasing Malay heritage and cultural identity through horology.
Japanese independent brand known for affordable dress and field watches with vintage aesthetic. Uses Seiko and Miyota movements.
WatchDives is a Vietnamese microbrand known for producing affordable automatic watches with good quality construction.

latestModel: WINNER Watch Hollow Men's Watch Automatic Luminous
notes: Winner is a mechanical watch brand founded in 2017. The brand specializes in automatic and manual mechanical watches with skeleton dials and stainless steel cases, available in luxury and casual styles.

Thai watch brand known for contemporary design combined with rich cultural craftsmanship. Produces diver watches like the Hitman model with customization options. Operates as a micro brand with multiple model series including the AD8 Damascus collection.

latestModel: Transversal cylindrical movement with lateral tourbillon
notes: Self-taught Chinese watchmaker who became an independent watchmaker in his 50s after an engineering career. AHCI member since 2015 (only the second Chinese member at the time). Known for unusual complications including a thermometer-style time display.

Yazole is a professional manufacturer and supplier of wristwatches established in 2010 by Shantou Yazole Trading Co., Ltd in China. The brand produces ladies, mens, and kids watches, featuring elegant designs particularly for women with slim fit styles.
New Zealand microbrand founded in 2021 by Derek Chuan, a mechanical engineer. Inspired by New Zealand's colours and textures, known for field watches like the Iceborne with legible dial layouts.
Indonesian watch brand focused on timeless design and high quality products with good value for money. Operates as a local brand with stainless steel watch cases.

Zentier is a microbrand founded by Morten Loewe, a former World, European, and British Open Latin American Dance-Sport Champion. The brand creates watches designed for the modern gentleman with elegance and timeless style. Known for models featuring unique complications like jumping hour mechanisms and natural stone dials.
Zeroo is known for creating innovative watches without traditional hour markers or hands, using LED displays in a unique design approach. The brand emphasizes modern, minimalist aesthetics.
Hong Kong-based brand founded in 2017. Commissions Swiss-assembled movements. Headquarters in Ocean Centre, Harbour City, Kowloon.
